title: ALTERNATIVE PATHWAYS/TRIO - 211info
text: MULTNOMAH EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT ALTERNATIVE PATHWAYS/TRIO Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Alternative Pathways is an educational program designed to assist alternative high school students in pursuing a postsecondary education. Services provided include weekly postsecondary education prep courses, one-on-one academic advising and transition planning, college tours, guest speakers, parent information workshops, and assistance with college applications, financial aid, and scholarship applications. Serves 11 alternative high schools and programs in Multnomah County. 11611 NE Ainsworth Circle Portland, OR 97220 Eligibility: Income restrictions, enrollment in Multnomah County alternative high school, desire to pursue postsecondary education Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (503) 257-1654 .12.. Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 257-1654 Program Manager Geoffrey Garner [email protected] Alternate (503) 257-1693 College Transition Advocate Alice Beseau [email protected] Alternate (503) 257-1689 College Transition Advocate Lori Thompson [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Multnomah County Services: College/University Entrance Support Higher Education Awareness/Support Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - EDUCATION SERVICE DISTRICT EDUCATIONAL PROGRAMS - MIGRANT EDUCATION PROGRAM EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - HOME SCHOOLING EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SPECIAL EDUCATION SERVICES LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - OUTDOOR SCHOOL If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
